guyana_coastal.context_statement: This module centers coastal Guyanese lived musical practice and intergenerational knowledge transfer.
regional_examples: School-yard rhythm games adapted for Kabakaburi and Santa Rosa

guyana_hinterland.context_statement: This module integrates hinterland community knowledge, land-based listening, and local instrument craft traditions.
regional_examples: Village celebration song cycles in Kamarang/Warawatta and Waramaong
Handmade percussion from locally available materials in Kabakaburi and Santa Rosa

caribbean_general.context_statement: This module is adapted for Caribbean musical lineages, emphasizing local identity and community transmission.
